description:
Progress: foundation + halt-kind plumbing landed (commits f46dd968, fc1ff766). The closure_target_fns force-drop is STILL blocked, but on a different issue than originally documented.

## Updated blocker: spawn-thunk seam (not raw fz_spawn_entry ABI)

The halt-kind plumbing works: closure header packs halt_kind (high 2 bits of flags), fz_spawn_entry loads it and selects halt_cont_body_{tagged,i64,f64} by kind. Goldens diff cleanly across all closure-using fixtures.

But the force-drop still breaks spawn_enqueues_child_task. Root cause discovered:

ir_lower.rs:710-723 wraps EVERY spawn(closure) call in a synthesized fz_spawn_thunk whose terminator is TailCallClosure on the captured closure. The thunk's chain endpoint type IS the captured closure's return type, but chain_repr (src/ir_codegen.rs:2682-2745) has no TailCallClosure case — it defaults to JOIN identity = Tagged.

So when MakeClosure(fz_spawn_thunk, [child]) is emitted, the thunk's halt_kind is packed as 0 (Tagged), even though child returns RawInt. fz_spawn_entry loads the thunk's halt_kind (Tagged), picks halt_cont_body_tagged. child's Term::Return tail-calls cont's body, passing raw 42. halt_cont_body_tagged unboxes via sshr_imm → 5.

## Resolution paths (pick when scoping)

(α) chain_repr learns TailCallClosure. When the captured arg's Descr resolves to a callable with known return Descr (via fn_constants on the capture), use the capture's chain repr as the contribution. Per-spec, since each MakeClosure site has its own capture key.

(β) Skip the spawn-thunk in the lowerer for spawn(x) where x is a closure value. spawn(MakeClosure(fid, [])) → fz_spawn(MakeClosure(fid, [])) with no thunk. The thunk was originally there to defer body invocation pre-stub-deletion; with current Tail-CC indirect-call ABI it's no longer needed. Probably the cleanest fix.

(γ) Detect the thunk pattern at codegen and special-case its halt_kind = capture[0]'s halt_kind. Targeted but fragile if the lowerer ever changes the thunk shape.

## Already in tree

- arrow_join_return on Descr.
- typer cont_slot0_descr extension for Term::CallClosure.
- Closure header halt-kind packing (low 14 bits = captured_count, high 2 bits = halt_kind).
- alloc_closure / init_static_closures / fz_aot_register_static_closure / fz_spawn_entry threading halt_kind end-to-end.
- All goldens re-blessed.

## Not in scope (still)

Closure body ARG slot narrowing — see fz-ul4.27.22.7.
title: fz-cps-seam.return: closure body return-slot narrowing via typer cont_slot0_descr
